page_content:
DATA250 Discrete Mathematics (4 Credits) Introduction to basic discrete mathematical and linear algebraic structures and use of these mathematical structures to solve programming problems. Logic, set theory, formal proof methodology, functions, combinatorics, advanced counting techniques, and elements of linear algebra. Prerequisite: DATA110 or DATA120; and MATH141.

EALL369 Special Topics in Study Abroad III (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program. Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.
